nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Angola white-eye
nodes.summary: Angola white-eye（Zosterops kasaicus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Angola white-eye。

nodes.name: Angola white-eye
nodes.summary: The Angola white-eye (Zosterops kasaicus), is a small passerine bird in the white-eye family Zosteropidae. It is found from central Democratic Republic of the Congo to northern and central Angola. It was formerly considered to be conspecific with the northern yellow white-eye. Taxonomy The Angola white-eye was formally described in 1932 by the American ornithologist James Chapin based on a specimen that had been collected near Luluabourg (now Kananga) in the Kasaï region of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Chapin considered his specimen to be a subspecies of the forest white-eye (Zosterops stenocricotus) and coined the trinomial name Zosterops stenocricotus kasaicus. The Angola white-eye was formerly considered to be conspecific with the northern yellow white-eye (Zosterops senegalensis). The species were split based on the results of a molecular phylogenetic study published in 2020 that found significant genetic divergence between the two species. Three subspecies are recognised: Z. k. kasaicus Chapin, 1932 – central DR Congo to northeast Angola Z. k. heinrichi Meise, 1958 – northwest Angola Z. k. quanzae Meyer de Schauensee, 1933 – central Angola References
